endpoints.name: Device List
endpoints.description: The devices endpoint return list of all the STF devices including Disconnected and Offline
endpoints.notes: Replace {{OPENSTF_API_KEY}} with your OPENSTF API KEY.

endpoints.name: Device Information
endpoints.description: The device enpoint return information about a single device
endpoints.notes: Replace {{OPENSTF_API_KEY}} with your OPENSTF API KEY. Replace {{SERIAL}} with a real serial.

endpoints.name: User Profile
endpoints.description: The User Profile endpoint returns information about current authorized user
endpoints.notes: Replace {{OPENSTF_API_KEY}} with your OPENSTF API KEY.

endpoints.name: Access Tokens
endpoints.description: The Access Tokens endpoints returns titles of all the valid access tokens
endpoints.notes: Replace {{OPENSTF_API_KEY}} with your OPENSTF API KEY.

endpoints.name: User Devices
endpoints.description: The User Devices endpoint returns device list owner by current authorized user
endpoints.notes: Replace {{OPENSTF_API_KEY}} with your OPENSTF API KEY.

endpoints.name: Add a device to a user
endpoints.description: The User Devices endpoint will request stf server for a new device.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{OPENSTF_API_KEY}} with your OPENSTF API KEY.

endpoints.name: User Device
endpoints.description: The devices enpoint return information about device owned by user
endpoints.notes: Replace {{OPENSTF_API_KEY}} with your OPENSTF API KEY. Replace {{SERIAL}} with a real serial.

endpoints.name: Delete User Device
endpoints.description: The User Devices endpoint will request for device release from stf server. It will return request accepted if device is being used by current user
endpoints.notes: Replace {{OPENSTF_API_KEY}} with your OPENSTF API KEY. Replace {{SERIAL}} with a real serial.

endpoints.name: Remote Connect
endpoints.description: The device connect endpoint will request stf server to connect remotely
endpoints.notes: Replace {{OPENSTF_API_KEY}} with your OPENSTF API KEY. Replace {{SERIAL}} with a real serial.

endpoints.name: Remote Disconnect
endpoints.description: The device connect endpoint will request stf server to disconnect remotely
endpoints.notes: Replace {{OPENSTF_API_KEY}} with your OPENSTF API KEY. Replace {{SERIAL}} with a real serial.
